name: World War I Fishbone Diagram
description: Create a Cause-and-Effect (Fishbone) diagram for the causes of World War I in ActivInspire. The diagram should feature a central spine, a head labeled 'WWI', and four branching ribs labeled with the M.A.I.N. causes: Militarism, Alliances, Imperialism, and Nationalism. Include the title 'Causes of World War I' at the top of the page and save the flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/ww1_fishbone.flipchart.
